title: zornia microphylla
intro: Zornia microphylla, also known as the small-flowered zornia, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Zornia microphylla can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for various herbal remedies, and its extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new medicines.
